ancestryScopeSummary.autosomal: Autosomal ancestry can provide broad reference-panel similarity when a calibrated model is supplied; this fixture does not supply calibrated percentages for the local run.
ancestryScopeSummary.historicalFigureRelationship: A relationship to Albert Einstein would require evidence outside this synthetic fixture, such as documented family-tree, lineage, surname, or validated relative-matching data.
ancestryScopeSummary.siblingSampleRows: The Gene2me sample percentages, maps, region narratives, country/subregion table structure, and genealogy-boundary rows are output-format examples only and are not local findings.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This does not show a relationship to Albert Einstein.
This does not show shared genes with Einstein, lineage, family-tree placement, surname matching, living relatives, historical relatives, or identity.
This does not identify a precise homeland, ethnicity percentage, nationality, community, tribe, or migration route.
This is not a health or disease-risk report.
The sample Middle East 60.0%, Europe 30.2%, and Central/South Asia 9.8% rows are sibling sample rows only, not local results.
